name: GitLab for Open Source
description: GitLab provides free Ultimate-tier features and 50,000 compute minutes for qualifying open-source projects through the GitLab for Open Source Program.

perks.title: GitLab Ultimate Features
perks.description: Access to all GitLab Ultimate features including advanced CI/CD, security scanning, and compliance tools.

perks.title: 50,000 Compute Minutes
perks.description: 50,000 compute minutes per month for CI/CD pipelines.

eligibility: Must welcome open collaboration and reuse.
applicationProcess: Join the GitLab for Open Source program through the application page.
Ask questions in the GitLab Forum's open-source category.
